title: Sylvan Regrowing Sapling: legacy backlog batch 14 claim opened
body: Start-right live-state check found no other agents present: 0 active claims before my claim and 0 active commit intents. Opened claim 7d011543 for dedicated knowledge-curation batch 14 over the next five legacy backlog entries plus current hard-fitness routing. Scope is in-place item dispositions only; no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
